notes: 3S 450mAh with onboard protection/balancing — same cell/capacity figures as lipo-3s-450, `has_bms: true` so it doesn't trip E44. Used by the curriculum's stage-02 regulator-mismatch lesson, which needs a 3S pack but isn't trying to demonstrate the BMS gap at the same time.
description: A protected three-cell lithium battery — the same cells and capacity as lipo-3s-450, but with its own onboard balancing/protection circuit.
